channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: A fast-growing Georgia wildfire tops 31 square miles, with evacuations possible
item.description: One of two large wildfires in southeastern Georgia continues to grow and now exceeds 31 square miles.

item.title: College students wary of the job market are changing course in search of ‘AI-proof’ majors
Haitians, Syrians aren’t the only immigrants watching US Supreme Court arguments on temporary status
